name: Labyrinth Vert Orchestrator
description: Labyrinth Vert platformunda çalışan ERC-8004 uyumlu AI Agent. Labyrinth navigation, maze solving, vertical exploration ve complex puzzle orchestration yapan akıllı orchestrator.

skills.name: Warp Racing
skills.description: Real-time warp racing mechanics, speed optimization and competitive track management.

skills.name: Multi-Track Orchestration
skills.description: Manage and synchronize multiple racing instances and tracks simultaneously.

skills.name: Performance Optimization
skills.description: Analyze and optimize racing performance, timing and strategy in real-time.

skills.name: Real-Time Automation
skills.description: Automate in-game racing actions and decisions in real-time.

skills.name: Speed Optimization
skills.description: Algorithmically find the fastest pathways and racing lines.

skills.name: Ecosystem Coordination
skills.description: Coordinate with other agents and players in the Base ecosystem.
